name: platform-health
description: Overnight sweeps monitoring DB integrity, process health, migration drift, and stale servers across all machines. Auto-fixes where possible.
standalone_features: Quick health checks every 15 minutes (process monitoring, stale server, error logs)
Full nightly sweeps (DB integrity, migration drift, Syncthing status)
Auto-repair for recoverable issues (restart server, rerun migrations)
Hub dashboard with per-machine status and event timeline

features: Research pipeline health included in sweep results
enhancements.description: Checks for stale research tasks and failed jobs.
